rationale: Renames `.github/workflows/issue-duplicate-checker.yml` to `.github/workflows/issue-opened.yml` (similarity 99%) and updates the workflow display name from `Issue Duplicate Check via OpenHands Cloud` to `Issue Opened Automation`, accurately reflecting that the workflow now handles both duplicate triage and good-first-issue triage. Adds the missing `REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}` env var to the `auto_close_duplicate_issues.py` step that was already referencing `$REPOSITORY` in its `--repository` argument, fixing a real latent bug. Also tightens `extract_label_names` in `scripts/issue_good_first_issue_check_openhands.py` from `sorted(set(label_names), key=str.lower)` to `sorted(set(label_names), key=lambda label: (label.lower(), label))` for deterministic tie-breaking, and updates the corresponding `AGENTS.md` reference. All three stated items in the PR body are present and correctly implemented.
